servers.name: paymcp-demo

permissions.explanation: The server receives a secret or credential through its environment.
permissions.recommendation: Use the least-privileged credential possible and rotate it if exposed.

permissions.explanation: The server receives a secret or credential through its environment.
permissions.recommendation: Use the least-privileged credential possible and rotate it if exposed.

permissions.explanation: The server can read repository data.
The server may be able to write to repositories if the token has write scopes.
permissions.recommendation: Use a fine-grained GitHub token and prefer read-only scopes unless write actions are required.

permissions.explanation: The server may access payment data.
The server may initiate financial transactions.
permissions.recommendation: Use restricted API keys and enable webhook verification.

installRisks.explanation: The uvx package is not pinned to a specific version.

saferConfigSuggestions.title: Use a fine-grained GitHub token
saferConfigSuggestions.explanation: Fine-grained personal access tokens allow scoping permissions to specific repositories and actions.
